[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A close-up anime-style illustration shows a young person with short light hair and large eyes looking toward the viewer while holding their arm up across their chest.  

Main Subject:  
The main subject is an anime-style character with light gray or ash-colored short hair with darker shading near the roots, large golden-brown eyes, and a small mouth visible. The person is shown from the shoulders up at a slight angle, with one hand near the left side of the frame gripping or pulling fabric close. The character wears a light-colored outfit with a white and pale lavender collar and sleeves, and the clothing appears layered with folds and creases. Small decorative marks resembling sparkles are visible near the right side of the head, and a small star-like highlight appears on the face near the cheek area.

Setting:  
The background is minimal and out of focus, with soft pink and light gray tones, and no clear real-world environment is visible. The lighting appears bright and even, with a slight glow effect on the face and hair.

Visual Details:  
The image has a soft, stylized, cel-shaded look with fine linework around the eyes and mouth. The eyes have dark upper outlines and pale highlights, and the hair reflects light with multiple lighter strands near the top. The character’s pose includes the raised left arm and hand near the left edge of the frame, and the fabric they hold is pale lavender with white sections. Composition is tightly cropped on the face and upper torso, with the character’s head occupying most of the image and the camera angle close and slightly tilted.

Visible Text:  
No important visible text detected.

Practical Summary:  
The image is a close-up anime-style drawing of a character with light hair and large eyes, shown holding fabric near their chest. The background is plain and soft-colored, keeping focus on the character’s face and upper body.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
